title: ageratum matricarioides
intro: Ageratum matricarioides, also known as blue mallow or whorled ageratum, is a perennial flowering plant native to North America. The plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Ageratum matricarioides include reducing inflammation, soothing sore throats, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
